design_plan: rng=42; AIDA=pass; hero_lines=2; bento_density=grid-auto-flow:dense; competitors_sweep=pass; button_contrast=AA
headline: Super vs Gemini — personal AI agents for real computer work

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Gemini. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Gemini

summary: A fair comparison of Super and Google Gemini for people evaluating personal AI agents and computer-use automation. Gemini is pushing browser-native and desktop automation through Gemini Spark and Gemini 3.5 Flash computer use. Super is built for people who want durable, repeated computer workflows — with a reusable computer-use cache that lowers cost and friction over time.
